tool_args.label: Woodhaven & Cross Bay Blvd Q52/53 Select Bus Service

payload.project_name: Woodhaven & Cross Bay Blvd Q52/53 Select Bus Service
payload.description: Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service (SBS) route based on existing Q52 and Q53 bus routes. Important north/south transit corridor carrying over 30,000 daily bus riders in Queens. Project goal to transform corridor into a complete street with faster/more reliable bus service, safer streets, and improved traffic and local conditions. Proposed as short-term Operational Project in 2017 followed by longer-term Capital Project.

payload.street: Woodhaven Boulevard and Cross Bay Boulevard
payload.description: Important north/south transit corridor carrying over 30,000 daily bus riders in Queens along with heavy traffic volumes
Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service route based on existing Q52 bus route
Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service route based on existing Q53 bus route

tool_args.label: Bus only lanes on Woodhaven Blvd (2015)

payload.location_text: Woodhaven Blvd between Dry Harbor Rd and Metropolitan Av
payload.description: DOT installed bus only lanes on Woodhaven Blvd between Dry Harbor Rd and Metropolitan Av in August 2015, recommended under the Woodhaven Blvd Congested Corridors Study. Bus lanes in effect Mon-Fri, 7-10am and 4-7pm. Vehicles can enter or cross over a bus lane to make right turns, access a curb cut or driveway within 200', enter a parking space, or to quickly drop-off or pick up passengers.
